title: getMessage()
text: getMessage() Get the timer message from the UTIMER component. Explain this code operation getMessage params string MsgDestination : OUT string MsgId : OUT string MsgData : OUT endparams Copy Parameters MsgDestination —path to the component instance to which the message is sent. MsgId —message ID of the message that is sent to the component. MsgData —message data that is sent to the component. Return Values The value returned in $status is always 0 . Use Allowed in all Uniface component types. Description The getMessage() operation gets the message from the current instance of the UTIMER component for the given destination component instance.
